name: Women's Satin Metal Square Sunglasses with Gradient Lenses - Universal Thread™ Black: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Complement your sunny-day outfits with the Satin Metal Square Sunglasses with Gradient Lenses from Universal Thread™. These square sunglasses feature black frames with gradient lenses for an eye-catching look. Made with metal frames, the lenses have a UV protection design to help keep your eyes shielded from harmful sun rays.

Universal Thread™: Found exclusively at Target.
